positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a futuristic city skyline at twilight. The composition features interlocking geometric shapes representing diverse architecture, framed by dramatic, clean silhouettes of mountains and palm trees. Use a vibrant neon color palette of deep sapphire blue, electric cyan, and warm magenta for the sky and accents. The main focus should be a strong, repeating pattern element that suggests progress and connectivity, giving it a highly adaptable, repeating print quality. High contrast, vector-style digital illustration, pop art aesthetic, clean outlines, centered and symmetrical.
negative: low detail, artifacts, blurry, text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, realistic photography, messy, cluttered, cartoon, grayscale
